productName: Stingers - 5pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Super Boof - 2.5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Super Boof supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
